scripts.build: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go build
scripts.lint: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go lint
scripts.vet: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go vet
scripts.test: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go test
scripts.check: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go check
scripts.clean: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go clean
scripts.tidy: cd seed && go run magefiles/mage_bootstrap.go tidy
